zh.lifeSummary: 當Élisabeth de Fiennes於1246年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯範恩斯時，她的父親Enguerrand de Fiennes54歲，母親Agnès de Condé de Morialmes31歲。她於1257年5月13日與Bernard de Berneuilles在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯波尼額洛斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1289年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯波尼額洛斯享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Élisabeth de Fiennes于1246年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯範恩斯时，她的父亲Enguerrand de Fiennes54岁，母亲Agnès de Condé de Morialmes31岁。她于1257年5月13日与Bernard de Berneuilles在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯波尼額洛斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1289年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯波尼額洛斯享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fiennes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Finnis
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: locative name from Fiennes (Pas-de-Calais).  See also  Filtness  .

nameMeanings.name: Élisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Élisabeth de Fiennes was born in 1246, in Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Enguerrand de Fiennes, was 54 and her mother, Agnès de Condé de Morialmes, was 31. She married Bernard de Berneuilles on 13 May 1257, in Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1289, in Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Élisabeth de Fiennes est née en 1246, à Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Enguerrand de Fiennes, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Condé de Morialmes, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Bernard de Berneuilles le 13 mai 1257, à Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1289, à Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Élisabeth de Fiennes 1246 in Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Enguerrand de Fiennes 54 und ihre Mutter Agnès de Condé de Morialmes 31. Sie hat am 13. Mai 1257 in Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich Bernard de Berneuilles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1289 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Élisabeth de Fiennes è nata il nel 1246 nel Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Enguerrand de Fiennes, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Agnès de Condé de Morialmes, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Bernard de Berneuilles il 13 maggio 1257, nel Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1289, nel Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Élisabeth de Fiennesが1246年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスフィーンスで生まれた時，父Enguerrand de Fiennesは54歳，母Agnès de Condé de Morialmesは31歳であった。1257年5月13日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスバーニーウレスでBernard de Berneuillesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1289年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスバーニーウレスで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Élisabeth de Fiennes(이)가 1246년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 피네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Enguerrand de Fiennes(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès de Condé de Morialmes(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1257년 5월 13일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 버니우레스에서 Bernard de Berneuilles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1289년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 버니우레스에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Élisabeth de Fiennes nasceu em 1246, em Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Enguerrand de Fiennes, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Condé de Morialmes, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Bernard de Berneuilles em 13 de maio de 1257, em Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1289, em Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Élisabeth de Fiennes родилась в 1246 г. в местности фиеннесь, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Enguerrand de Fiennes было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Condé de Morialmes, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bernard de Berneuilles 13 мая 1257 г. в местности бирниеуллесь, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1289 г. в местности бирниеуллесь, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Élisabeth de Fiennes nació en 1246, en Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Enguerrand de Fiennes, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Agnès de Condé de Morialmes, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Bernard de Berneuilles el 13 de mayo de 1257, en Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1289, en Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 43 años.
